title: Cloud Engineer
description: Design and manage cloud infrastructure on AWS. Automate deployments using Terraform and CI/CD pipelines. Monitor and troubleshoot production systems.

title: Cloud Engineer
description: Build and maintain Azure-based cloud solutions. Implement containerized microservices and manage CI/CD workflows.

title: Backend Developer
description: Develop and maintain backend services using Django. Design RESTful APIs and optimize database queries for performance.

title: Backend Developer
description: Build scalable microservices with Spring Boot. Integrate with databases and message queues for high-throughput systems.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Build responsive, accessible web applications using React and TypeScript. Collaborate with designers to implement pixel-perfect UIs.

title: Frontend Developer
description: Develop modern single-page applications with Vue.js. Ensure cross-browser compatibility and write comprehensive tests.

title: Data Analyst
description: Analyze business data to generate actionable insights. Build dashboards and automate reporting pipelines.

title: DevOps Engineer
description: Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines. Manage container orchestration and infrastructure as code for cloud-native applications.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst
description: Monitor security events, investigate incidents, and implement defensive measures. Conduct vulnerability assessments and maintain SIEM platforms.

title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Develop and deploy machine learning models. Preprocess data, train models, and integrate them into production pipelines.
